summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flat Ledger expense splitting app. Backend APIs fully functional with minor fix applied. Frontend core functionality working with one UI interaction issue.

fixed_bugs.issue: KeyError: 'id' when creating expenses - user object missing 'id' field
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Added 'id' field to user object in get_current_user function

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents form submission - 'Add Expense' button not clickable due to dialog overlay interception

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct summary cards (Total Expenses, My Share, Balance)
User management (get users, toggle active status)
Expense CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Member list display with all 5 predefined users
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in Add Expense form - the dialog overlay is intercepting pointer events preventing form submission. Consider using force=True for clicks or adjusting modal z-index/pointer-events CSS.
